hero.subtitle: Web apps, e-commerce, and AI, from business problem to shipped result. Signed contract and 6 months of guarantee on every project.

services.heading: Which stack fits your project?
services.subheading: I match the technology to the task, so you don't overpay for complexity or support you don't need.

custom-web.title: Complex web platforms & startups
custom-web.description: Custom platforms, SaaS, marketplaces, and dashboards with non-trivial logic, built on Django 5 and Next.js 15.

ecommerce.title: E-commerce on 1C-Bitrix
ecommerce.description: Online stores of any complexity, synced reliably with 1C:UT.

marketing.title: Digital marketing & performance
marketing.description: Yandex Direct setup and management, full-funnel analytics, and optimization against your target KPIs.

corporate.title: Corporate websites (WordPress)
corporate.description: Fast, SEO-ready business sites. Content you can manage yourself. Built to scale.

legacy.title: Support & legacy
legacy.description: I take over existing Bitrix and WordPress projects: fix bugs, update, speed them up.

ai-consulting.title: AI consulting
ai-consulting.description: I integrate LLMs into your workflows: support bots, content generation, data analytics.

b2bGuarantees.heading: Why work with me instead of an agency?
b2bGuarantees.subheading: Signed contract, 6-month guarantee, and direct communication, no account managers in between.

contract.title: Signed contract
contract.desc: We work under a contract with an NDA. I provide all closing documents and receipts, and accept bank transfers.

guarantee.title: 6-month guarantee
guarantee.desc: Six months of free technical support after handover. If a bug shows up, I fix it for free.

solo-ai.title: One-man band + AI
solo-ai.desc: I work solo and use AI to speed up routine work. You don't pay for a bloated agency team.

goals.title: Business-goal driven
goals.desc: I work with partners who know why they need the product. I dig into the unit economics and aim at metrics, not experiments.

process.heading: How do we start working together?
process.subheading: Three steps from inquiry to launch, transparent and without red tape.

01.title: Scoping the task
01.desc: You come with a clear goal, I propose a technical solution without over-engineering.

02.title: Estimate & roadmap
02.desc: A transparent estimate, timeline, and step-by-step plan, fixed in the contract.

03.title: Development
03.desc: Sprints with regular demos. You always see the progress.

experience.heading: How does my experience help your business?
experience.subheading: 10+ years in development, e-commerce, and digital marketing. I understand unit economics, not just technology.

promptspace.description: Building a platform for monetizing AI prompts. Designed the microservice architecture, built semantic search, envelope encryption, and the payment system.

armedika.description: Supported and grew e-commerce projects on 1C-Bitrix, synced with 1C:UT. Ran email marketing (Unisender), paid search, content, and media optimization for the catalog.

kazanova.description: Ran the e-commerce division: team, profitability, tech roadmap, and marketing strategy end to end.

ura.description: Collected and analyzed big data, ran A/B tests, built full-funnel analytics, and drove SEO strategy.

a2.company: UK A2, Lesnye Traditsii, Estetis, and others
a2.description: Website development, analytics setup (AmoCRM, Roistat), paid search, and end-to-end SEO across multiple companies.

person.name: Alexander Butakov
person.jobTitle: IT consultant and web application developer

contract.q: Do you work under an official contract?
contract.a: Yes. I work under a contract and sign an NDA. I provide all closing documents and receipts, and accept bank transfers through Russia's e-document system. Sole proprietor Alexander Butakov, INN 667011271708.

guarantee.q: What's the warranty on development work?
guarantee.a: Six months of free technical support. If a bug shows up after handover, I fix it for free.

soloAi.q: Why is working with you cheaper than an agency?
soloAi.a: I work solo and use AI tools to speed up routine work. You don't pay for a bloated management layer, and you get direct access to the person doing the work.

process.q: How do we start working together?
process.a: Three steps: you send an inquiry, I prepare an estimate and roadmap, then we work in sprints with regular demos.

remote.q: Do you work with clients from other cities or regions?
remote.a: Yes, I work remotely across Russia. All communication happens over Telegram or video calls, paperwork through the e-document system.

metadata.title: Alexander Butakov | Technical Partner and Web Application Developer
